alkylation reagent: containing 40 mM DTT and 40 mM iodoacetamide.
alkylation concentration: containing 40 mM DTT and 40 mM iodoacetamide.
enrichment method: using CaptAvidin Agarose used in these experiments.
fragmentation method: data collection used a top three in abundance selection for centroided tandem CID MS.
instrument: injection on the LTQ-Orbitrap XL mass spectrometer.
ionization type: confirmed by matrix-assisted laser desorption/ionization time-of-flight mass spectrometry (MALDI-TOF-MS).
